content.text:
Context: This summary will be shown in a list to help users and Claude choose which conversations are relevant.

Please write a concise, factual summary that synthesizes these part-summaries into one cohesive paragraph. Focus on what was accomplished and any notable technical decisions or challenges. Output in <summary></summary> tags. Claude will see this summary when searching previous conversations for useful memories and information.

Part summaries:
1. User and agent worked through brainstorming a report automation system for a self-developed internal web service. Key decisions made: (1) target is logged-in member reports only, excluding non-members; (2) SMS authentication is skipped for members; (3) login uses simple ID/PW form with session reuse; (4) location selection via address search with autocomplete is the preferred approach over map markers or API bypass. Agent presented design questions systematically to scope the automation scope, confirm authentication handling, and validate technical assumptions about the existing Spring Boot application.
2. 사용자와 AI가 신고 자동화 테스트 시스템의 최종 설계를 확정했습니다. 초기 design.md에서 Git 모듈, before/after 동시 캡처, 모바일 구현을 제거하고, 로컬 애플리케이션 baseline 기준으로 단순화했습니다. Electron UI + Playwright 자동화 + DB 검증 + 비교 분석 구조로 22개 신고 케이스를 검증하는 워크플로우를 재설계 중입니다.
3. Designed and documented a comprehensive regression testing automation tool for a Korean civic reporting system. The tool captures baseline database records from production code, then verifies code changes against baselines by automating 22 test cases (8 safety, 6 livability, 8 traffic violation reports) through Playwright UI automation and comparing database results. Architected as a portable Windows Electron app with 3-tab UI (Settings, Case Status, Run & Results), TDD-driven engine core (case loader, comparator, diff generator, snapshot store), and 34-task implementation plan spanning 5 phases over ~3 weeks.
4. User paused implementation and requested rule document creation. Agent created CLAUDE.md with 11 sections covering project scope, architecture rules, code standards, testing policy, and workflow guidelines. User then identified that the design v2.0 was split into 11 separate markdown files for better modularity, deleted the old v1.0 version and monolithic v2.0, and updated all references in CLAUDE.md and implementation documents to point to the new design/ folder structure.

Good:
<summary>Built conversation search system with JavaScript, sqlite-vec, and local embeddings. Implemented hierarchical summarization for long conversations. System archives conversations permanently and provides semantic search via CLI.</summary>

Bad:
<summary>This conversation synthesizes several topics discussed across multiple parts...</summary>

Your summary (max 200 words):

<summary>
Designed and implemented a regression testing automation system for a Korean civic reporting web service. The system validates code changes through 22 automated test cases (8 safety, 6 livability, 8 traffic reports) using Playwright UI automation and database comparison against production baselines. Architecture uses portable Windows Electron app with 3-tab UI (Settings, Case Status, Run & Results) and TDD-driven engine (case loader, comparator, diff generator, snapshot store). Key design decisions: target logged-in members only, simple ID/password authentication with session reuse, location selection via address autocomplete. Documented comprehensive project governance in CLAUDE.md covering scope, architecture rules, code standards, testing policy, and workflow. Refactored monolithic design into modular markdown files in design/ folder for better maintainability. Planned 34-task implementation across 5 phases over ~3 weeks.
</summary>
